pageDescription: Calculate marriage  with our free online calculator

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides marriage  estimates only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual values may vary based on individual circumstances

importantNotesList: This is an estimate and should not replace professional advice
Results may vary based on individual factors
Use consistent units for accurate results

messages.enterInformation: Enter the required information to calculate marriage
messages.resultMessage: Your marriage  calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides marriage  estimates based on standard methods. Actual values may vary based on individual circumstances and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized advice and detailed information, consult with professionals who can provide guidance based on individual needs and circumstances.

errors.input1: Please enter a valid first value
errors.input2: Please enter a valid second value
errors.input3: Please enter a valid third value

enter_both_spouses_information_to_see_yo: Enter both spouses' information to see your marriage tax impact
total_income_wages_interest_passive_stcg: Total Income = Wages + Interest + Passive + STCG + LTCG + Qualified Dividends
taxable_income_total_income_deductions_s: Taxable Income = Total Income - Deductions - Self-Employment Tax Deduction
joint_income_spouse_1_total_income_spous: Joint Income = Spouse 1 Total Income + Spouse 2 Total Income
joint_taxable_joint_income_joint_deducti: Joint Taxable = Joint Income - Joint Deductions - Combined SE Tax Deduction
penaltybenefit_individual_tax_1_individu: Penalty/Benefit = (Individual Tax 1 + Individual Tax 2) - Joint Tax
positive_result_marriage_benefit_negativ: Positive result = Marriage Benefit | Negative result = Marriage Penalty
marriage_impact_penalty_or_benefit_joint: Marriage Impact % = (Penalty or Benefit ÷ Joint Income) × 100
